kfc_popcorn_box.description: Shrububu's emergency popcorn box. Breaks Banana-burbs' joy spell when shared.
kfc_popcorn_box.flavor_text: Kept for emotional emergencies, civic spellbreaking, and situations where regular dialogue cannot compete with fried chicken scent.

gummies.description: The only thing served at the Area 111 pub. Technically edible, spiritually offensive.
gummies.flavor_text: Soft, neon, and accused of being dinner by people who have forgotten what dinner is supposed to do.

kfc_bucket.description: The object of Shrububu's search and SRMT's final insult from the throne.
kfc_bucket.flavor_text: The bucket smells like victory, tyranny, dungeon keys, and a journey that got completely out of hand.

divorce_papers.description: Paper trail tying Satyaki's revenge to Divorcee Harbour's suffering.
divorce_papers.flavor_text: Waterlogged pages, bitter margins, and enough resentment to qualify as structural support.

berry_order.description: A suspiciously large berry request made under the promise of fried chicken.
berry_order.flavor_text: A huge order, a fake promise, and the exact moment Berry Barks learns Shrububu reads the fine print.
